error[E0277]: can't compare `&i32` with `i32`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/llama-3.1-70b/declarations/restrict_def_3/sample_001/target.rs:18:36
   |
18 |     p.iter().zip(q).all(|(a, b)| a == b * 2)
   |                                    ^^ no implementation for `&i32 == i32`
   |
   = help: the trait `PartialEq<i32>` is not implemented for `&i32`
help: consider dereferencing here
   |
18 |     p.iter().zip(q).all(|(a, b)| *a == b * 2)
   |                                  +

error[E0277]: cannot add `Ref<'_, {integer}>` to `i32`

25 |         sink ^= x[i] + opaque.borrow();
   |                      ^ no implementation for `i32 + Ref<'_, {integer}>`
   |
   = help: the trait `Add<Ref<'_, {integer}>>` is not implemented for `i32`
help: consider dereferencing here

25 |         sink ^= x[i] + *opaque.borrow();
   |                        +
